'''Grillo Zammon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Rozatta]] for stealing her fuel cell shipments. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], worth 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 2,000 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]], was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].
